description_long: This guard rail is constructed from a series of rectangular metal bars arranged in a grid pattern, forming a sturdy linear barrier. The main horizontal rails are supported by evenly spaced vertical posts, each anchored to a wide base plate for stability. The structure is entirely metallic, with a uniform gray finish that suggests galvanized or stainless steel, providing both durability and resistance to corrosion. The open grid design allows visibility and airflow while still serving as an effective barrier. The ends of the rail are blunt, with no additional flaring or safety treatments visible. There are no reflective markings or decorative elements, giving the guard rail a utilitarian, industrial appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A robust, gray metal guard rail with a rectangular grid pattern and evenly spaced vertical supports anchored by base plates. The design is utilitarian and industrial, with blunt ends and no reflective markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full grid pattern and all vertical supports with base plates visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the rail and the depth of the base plates.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the grid structure and support arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and base plate extensions.
